results.rendered_html: !√prabhāvay (von prabhāva), ˚yati Macht haben, Macht ausüben, viel vermögen über (acc.): (gominaḥ) prabhāvayanti rāṣṭraṃ ca vyavahāraṃ kṛṣiṃ tathā  MBH. 12,3299 . evaṃ manaḥ pradhānāni indriyāṇi prabhāvayet 11588 . jarayā puruṣo jīrṇaḥ kiṃ hi kṛtvā prabhāvayet  R. 2,105,21 . kathaṃ ca khalvātmabalaṃ ca tattvataḥ prabhāvayenmāṃ ca raṇe daśānanaḥ 5,37,35 . mahāyakṣaḥ prabhāvitaḥ mächtig  KATHĀS. 13,165 .
